results.title: Stefan Al’s spirited account of what humans have got right and wrong when making homes
results.description: Dwelling on Earth: The Past and Future of the Places We Call Home by Stefan Al

results.title: TNA Wrestler To Freeze Her Eggs
results.description: TNA Wrestling star Jody Threat is opening up about a deeply personal decision regarding her future family plans. Taking to social media, the former TNA Knockouts World Tag Team Champion revealed that she wants to use her platform to discuss cryopreservation and the difficult choices many career-focused women face when thinking about having children later [...]

results.title: Midland Commons Spring Concert Series wraps up with final show
results.description: Midland Commons ended the Spring Concert Series with one last night of live music Friday.
